creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 163914
svn patch to tint 0.12.3

The attached patch updates x11/tint to version 0.12.3. This is mostly a bugfix release with only some small new features. Applicable to FreeBSD are:

 * Mouse over effects (mouse_effects, background_color_hover, border_color_hover)
 * Launcher icon background (launcher_icon_background_id)
 * Enable/disable battery tooltips (battery_tooltip_enabled)

The port itself is unchanged, just the version number was bumped. The updated was tested with Poudriere on FreeBSD 10.2, 10.1 and 9.3.
